top_stories.title: BSP delivers first interest rate hike in 2 years
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines — For the first time in more than two years, the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) raised its benchmark interest rate on Thursday, responding to a fresh surge in inflation fueled by oil price shocks linked to the Middle East war. top_stories.title: Gov't secures 21,000 metric tons of US-sourced LPG to boost fuel supply
top_stories.summary: The Department of Energy and the Philippine National Oil Company have secured 21,000 metric tons of liquefied petroleum gas sourced from the United States to shore up supply stability amid global market volatility and tensions in the Middle East.

top_stories.title: PSEi extends slump on rate hike, inflation fears
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine Stock Exchange Index (PSEi) extended losses on Friday as investors digested the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas’ (BSP) latest rate hike and rising inflation expectations. secondary_signals.title: OIL PRICES: Diesel cuts seen at up to P10/liter on April 28
